title: Lu'daal-ud

{{Quote|The files we believe to be in Lu'daal-ud's possession are extremely important to the Alliance. If sold to the Imperials (we seriously doubt Lu'daal-ud would simply hand them over), the information in them could conceivably be decoded and expose several of our operations. Though Lu'daal-ud is now a member of the Granse Confederacy and much more difficult to get to, I am still seriously considering sending an independent team after him to retrieve those files. If any agents or operatives believe they are suitable for the task, notify the Task Force on Alliance Security and your petition will be discussed. This matter requires immediate attention, but the group is lethal, and we need a group we know is up to the challenge.|Commander [[Zgorth'sth]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Lu'daal-ud''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Findsman/Legends|findsman]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Gand (planet)/Legends|Gand]] and the second cousin of fellow findsman [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]. Like his second cousin, Lu'daal-ud was a member of the [[Breather Gand|breather]] [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] and heir of a [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]-old tradition of Gand findsmen and followed visions and hunches which were sent to them by the [[The Force/Legends|calling of the mists]]. These visions eventually took him away from his [[Homeworld/Legends|home planet]] and into the greater [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

==Biography==
Little was known of Lu'daal-ud's past after leaving his home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] other than that he worked for a loan shark named [[Ne'lear]] some [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], though it is assumed that he worked for several other groups before being blacklisted by them. After leaving the services of Ne'lear, Lu'daal-ud became a member of the [[Granse Confederacy]] and, since then, showed no signs of wanting to go back to the criminal underworld. It was perhaps during this [[Time/Legends|time]] that he acquired the ''[[Mist Laden]]'', a modified [[Sigma-class shuttle|''Sigma''-class shuttle]] which he took from its owner after capturing them for running afoul of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities in the [[Imberlin system/Legends|Imberlin system]]. Since then, the craft was modified by Lu'daal-ud's associates and proved to be a reliable [[Starship/Legends|starship]] for both he and his associates within the Granse Confederacy.<ref name="AIR" />

While working for the Confederacy, Lu'daal-ud claimed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Patel Odfath]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who had with him several key datafiles. Because of this, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]]—himself a Rebel agent—issued an order for the capture of Lu'daal-ud as the files which they assumed he kept contained information pertaining to the lives of nearly a thousand Rebel operatives in the [[Shiwal sector/Legends|Shiwal]] and [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sectors]], including at least the [[Walin'or cell]] and the [[Tierfon Rebel Outpost]].<ref name="AIR" />

It was believed by the Alliance that Lu'daal-ud would not simply hand over the files to the Empire, but if he was able to decode them and discovered their true nature, that he would attempt to sell them. Being a member of the Granse Confederacy meant that he would be difficult to apprehend, but even so, Commander Zgorth'sth still considered forming a team of independent agents to retrieve the files.<ref name="AIR" />

Because of his imminent threat to the Alliance, Lu'daal-ud was given a place in the Alliance's [[SecuriDex]] along with the rest of the members of the Granse Confederacy, and there was even a note left in the addendum stating that, if any agents or operatives thought they were up to the task of capturing him, they were to contact their [[Task force/Legends|task force]] on [[Security|Alliance Security]] for their proposal to be discussed.<ref name="AIR" />

At some point in time, a group of individuals were tasked to capture Lu'daal-ud's starship, the ''Mist Laden'', by a former member of the Granse Confederacy. Though a dangerous job, which meant stealing the ship from under the hunters' noses, it paid a hefty sum of 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. In another instance, a group of individuals took up Zgorth'sth's task and attempted to apprehend Lu'daal-ud as well as the files in his possession; it is unknown how either group of individuals fared.<ref name="AIR" />
